package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for context_stored_in_struct_field: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Struct fields that store context.Context instead of keeping context request-scoped through method parameters.
type CaseContextStoredInStructFieldDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseContextStoredInStructFieldModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseContextStoredInStructFieldRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseContextStoredInStructFieldModel
}

type CaseContextStoredInStructFieldService struct {
    repo *CaseContextStoredInStructFieldRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseContextStoredInStructFieldAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeContextStoredInStructField(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseContextStoredInStructFieldDTO) error {
    focus := "context_stored_in_struct_field"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    holder := struct{ requestID string }{requestID: input}
    _ = holder
    context_stored_struct_field_negative := map[string]int{"context": 1, "stored": 2, "struct": 3, "field": 4}
    context_stored_struct_field_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    context_negative_0 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_0
    stored_negative_1 := context_stored_struct_field_negative["stored"] + len(input)
    _ = stored_negative_1
    struct_negative_2 := context_stored_struct_field_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_2
    field_negative_3 := context_stored_struct_field_negative["field"] + len(input)
    _ = field_negative_3
    return nil
}
